# Favour Okafor

> Full-Stack Web3 Developer & Blockchain Security Engineer based in Nigeria, specializing in EVM architectures, secure smart contract systems, and high-performance frontend engineering.

- **Website & Portfolio:** https://favour-portfolio-neon.vercel.app
- **Preferred Citation:** Favour Okafor – Web3 Full-Stack & Security Engineer

---

## Technical Specializations

### Blockchain & Smart Contract Security
- **Languages:** Advanced Solidity
- **Frameworks & Tooling:** Foundry, Hardhat
- **Security Competencies:** Decentralized Finance (DeFi) security auditing, vulnerability identification (reentrancy, oracle manipulation, access control flaws), and gas optimization.

### Full-Stack Web Engineering
- **Frontend Architecture:** React, Next.js, Vite, TypeScript
- **Styling & UI Systems:** Tailwind CSS, modern utility-first interfaces
- **Backend & Services:** Building and scaling API integrations, managing state coordination between client applications and blockchain RPC nodes.

---

## Core Project Architectures & Experience

- **Decentralized Applications (dApps):** Engineering robust full-stack Web3 interfaces utilizing TypeScript and React/Next.js, ensuring graceful handling of cryptographic state and wallet connection lifecycles.
- **P2P Marketplace Systems:** Designing peer-to-peer infrastructure focused on low-latency data rendering, transaction state verification, and secure asset exchange workflows.
- **AI-Powered System Integrations:** Building intelligent, responsive frontend systems (including custom resume and document building logic) driven by specialized AI APIs and highly interactive layouts.
